task_completion.visual_evidence: ImageJ interface showing the 'blobs' sample image opened in a window.

task_completion.description: Configure measurements to include Area, Solidity, and Display Label
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Set Measurements' dialog in ImageJ with 'Area', 'Shape descriptors' (which includes Solidity), and 'Display label' checked, OR a Results table showing these specific columns.

task_completion.description: Filter particles with an area less than 50 pixels
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Analyze Particles' dialog showing 'Size' set to '50-Infinity', OR a Results table containing between 40 and 80 rows with no Area values under 50.

task_completion.description: Save the complete results table to solidity_measurements.csv
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or terminal confirming the Results table is saved as 'solidity_measurements.csv' in the '~/ImageJ_Data/results/' directory.

task_completion.description: Record the Label/ID and Solidity value of the roughest particle
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the creation of 'roughest_particle.txt' in '~/ImageJ_Data/results/' containing a Label/ID and a Solidity value (which should be approximately 0.8782).

integrity.description: Agent used the ImageJ GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with ImageJ menus, dialogs, and windows rather than using a terminal script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Results come from genuine software interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: The Results table in ImageJ is visible and populated with genuine data from the image analysis (around 59 rows), not manually typed or fabricated.

integrity.description: Agent did not copy-paste expected answers without analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent identified the roughest particle by sorting or inspecting the Results table in ImageJ, rather than just echoing a hardcoded value directly into the text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected CSV path is /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/solidity_measurements.csv. The expected TXT path is /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/roughest_particle.txt. The correct particle count after filtering for area >= 50 is 59 (acceptable range is 40-80). The minimum solidity value (roughest particle) is approximately 0.8782.
